focus: ATR DC#3 confirmed (regulated institutional, 0.79) — 2/3 ontological types for D4. BIC ZR#3 PASS (0.72).

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries. Parent of both RCBC (×RAAI) and BIC (×AIIP).

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades. First tier-3 theorem.

SI48_ATR.description: RAAI × AATE conjunction: multi-stage OA-feedback training produces monotone irrecoverable d' degradation. Standard alignment pipeline is anti-pattern for introspective self-knowledge.
SI48_ATR.dc1: AI training literature — designed empirical. Confirmed C81.
SI48_ATR.dc2: Educational over-coaching — designed empirical, distinct mechanism (metacognitive displacement). Confirmed C82.
SI48_ATR.dc3: Organizational compliance layering — regulated institutional. OSHA/safety, military ROE, medical Joint Commission, AML compliance. Burke 2006 meta-analysis + Hale & Borys 1998 + Zohar & Luria 2005. Confirmed C83.
SI48_ATR.dc3_novel_mechanism: Collective institutional selective pressure + structural invisibility guaranteed by regulatory architecture — institution cannot measure d' degradation because all monitoring instruments are OA-type
SI48_ATR.d4_path: 3+ ZR cycles (4/3 DONE) + 3 ontological DC types (2/3 done — designed empirical + regulated institutional. Need Type 3: competitive/emergent or theoretical/formal)
dc4_candidates: Competitive/emergent: credential inflation (bar exam, teaching credentials, civil service exam) — OA-metric gaming degrades professional competence signal
Historical/archival: historical professional certification inflation case studies
Theoretical/formal: formal model of d' degradation under OA-mandate (not yet done for ATR specifically)
SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff: behavioral safety metrics improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure. Confirmed DC#1, DC#2, DC#3.
SI48_ATR.note: D4 gap: need DC#4 in third ontological type. 2/3 types confirmed.

SI49_BIC.description: CIAP × AIIP conjunction: when AIIP fails, CIAP gaming propagates across correlated benchmark portfolio. Effective K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε << nominal K. Portfolio diversification cannot fix evaluation when AIIP fails.
SI49_BIC.derivation_1: Formal effective-K collapse: K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε, CIAP amplifies AIIP failure
SI49_BIC.derivation_2: Information-theoretic: I(G_i; G_j) > 0 under AIIP failure + CIAP → K_eff → 1 in limit
SI49_BIC.dc1: AI evaluation benchmark literature — designed empirical. Schaeffer 2023, GLUE/SuperGLUE saturation, Magar 2022 contamination transfer, HELM. Confirmed C82.
SI49_BIC.d4_path: 3+ ZR cycles (3/3 DONE) + 3 ontological DC types (1/3 done)
SI49_BIC.dc2_candidate: Fine-tuning transfer experiments — Phang 2018 STILTs (cross-task transfer from intermediate fine-tuning), Aghajanyan 2021 intrinsic dimensionality (shared low-d subspace = formal K_eff mechanism), Dodge 2020. Evidence accumulating. Ontological type: designed empirical (second domain).
SI49_BIC.dc3_candidate: Educational assessment portfolio or scientific replication consortia — different ontological type for 3rd type requirement
key_corollaries: Portfolio diversification failure (adding correlated benchmarks has vanishing K_eff gain)
Emergent abilities as BIC artifact (confirmed by Schaeffer 2023)
SI49_BIC.rcbc_relationship: RCBC = within-benchmark inflation; BIC = across-portfolio K_eff collapse. Together close 'add more benchmarks' response.

candidates.name: ATR
candidates.gap: DC#4 in third ontological type (competitive/emergent or theoretical/formal)
